name: Large scale analytics of global and regional MOOC providers
snippet:
2022 · Cited by 94 — We perform a large-scale study with 15 different MOOC providers and more than eight million learners. Regional MOOC providers attract larger local populations. Read more

name: Integrating actionable analytics into learning design for
